narrative:
Springfield Twp D (precinct in Summit County) has 974 registered voters, with 62.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 19.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 18.6%, a narrow Republican lean of 0.6 percentage points.
